data.title: XRP “Millionaire” Wallets Rise Despite Modest Price Dip: Santiment
data.description:
XRP “millionaire” wallets are rising again despite a modest price dip, signaling renewed long-term confidence among large holders.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/xrp-millionaire-wallets-rise-despite-modest-price-dip-santiment/

data.title: Binance Announces ZAMA Pre-TGE Prime Sale for Alpha Points Holders
data.description: Binance announced on X that users with at least 220 Binance Alpha Points are eligible to participate in the upcoming ZAMA Pre-TGE Prime Sale event. This opportunity is accessible through the Alpha activity page on the platform. Participants in this event will need to spend 15 Alpha Points to join.

data.title: An address that previously profited $14.26 million by buying low and selling high with WBTC has now opened a position of 4,000 ETH and is currently experiencing a floating loss of $141,000.
data.description: According to AiYi's monitoring, an address (0x3c9…8f757) that previously profited $14.26 million by buying low and selling high with WBTC withdrew 4,000 ETH from Kraken in the past 24 hours at an average price of $2,994.26, for a total value of $11.977 million. This address's most recent withdrawal occurred 2 hours ago, and it currently holds ETH with a paper loss of $141,000.

data.title: Copper Prices Expected to Surge Amid Shortage Crisis
data.description: Copper prices are anticipated to increase substantially over the next five years due to a looming shortage crisis affecting industries dependent on the metal. According to NS3.AI, copper is crucial for electric vehicle manufacturing and renewable energy sectors, which are experiencing rising demand. However, new mining projects typically require an average of 17 years to become productive. Predictions indicate that copper prices could exceed $8 by 2031 and potentially surpass $12 by 2038.

data.title: Binance: The threshold for Zama (ZAMA) Pre-TGE is 220 Alpha points.
data.description: Binance stated that Binance Wallet users with 220 or more Alpha Points can participate in the Zama (ZAMA) TGE presale through the Alpha Events page. Participation in this TGE event will deduct 15 Alpha Points.

data.title: Franklin Templeton Invests in AI Project Sentient for Financial Services Development
data.description: Franklin Templeton, a prominent global asset manager, has made a strategic investment in the AI project Sentient. According to NS3.AI, this collaboration is set to enhance institutional-grade financial services by utilizing Sentient's open-source artificial general intelligence technology. The partnership will concentrate on implementing advanced AI applications in live financial production environments in the upcoming months.

data.title: Silver Prices Reach New Highs in New York
data.description: Silver prices in New York have reached a significant milestone, surpassing $120 per ounce. According to ChainCatcher, data from Jinshi indicates that New York silver futures rose by 5.73% within the day. This marks the first time spot silver has exceeded $120 per ounce, setting a new record. In the first month of this year, silver prices have increased by nearly $50.

data.title: BitMart's new pre-market trading for Bitway (BTW) has begun.
data.description: According to official news, BitMart's latest pre-market trading project, Bitway (BTW), has been launched. The minting phase began today at 14:00 (UTC+8), and the pre-market trading phase will officially launch on January 30th at 14:00 (UTC+8). Users can mint assets by staking USDT and freely trade them in the pre-market spot market, enabling price discovery and early positioning before the project's official launch. As one of BitMart's innovative mechanisms, pre-market trading, together with the BMD discovery zone, DEX module, and LaunchPrime, forms a comprehensive chain service covering "discovery—circulation—incubation," helping users participate in high-quality projects earlier.

data.title: Analysis of TOTAL3 Chart Indicates Potential Altcoin Expansion
data.description: CyrilXBT posted on X. The TOTAL3 chart, which tracks the performance of altcoins excluding Bitcoin and Ethereum, remains a key focus for analysts. According to CyrilXBT, the chart is maintaining a multi-year uptrend, suggesting that the current market phase is a consolidation period rather than the end of the cycle. As long as the trendline holds, there is potential for further expansion in the altcoin market.

data.title: Ethereum Spot ETF Sees Significant Inflows in the U.S.
data.description: The U.S. Ethereum spot ETF has experienced a net inflow of $28.1 million. According to ChainCatcher, BlackRock's ETHA contributed significantly to this figure, with a net inflow of $27.3 million.

data.title: South Korea Mandates Criminal Record Reporting for Crypto Shareholders
data.description: South Korea's National Assembly has enacted a new amendment obligating virtual asset service providers to disclose the criminal records of their major shareholders. According to NS3.AI, this legislative move is designed to combat illegal activities, including money laundering, within the cryptocurrency industry. The amendment received strong support, passing with 246 votes in favor out of 247 total votes.

data.title: UAE Central Bank Approves USD-Backed Stablecoin USDU
data.description: The United Arab Emirates' central bank has given the green light for the issuance of USDU, a stablecoin backed by the US dollar, developed by Universal Digital. According to NS3.AI, the issuing company operates under the regulation of the Financial Services Regulatory Authority of Abu Dhabi Global Market. This approval represents a notable regulatory advancement for the adoption of stablecoins within the UAE's cryptocurrency landscape.

data.title: Both New York silver futures and spot silver have risen above $120.
data.description: New York silver futures climbed above $120 per ounce, up 5.73% on the day. Spot silver also broke through $120 per ounce for the first time, setting a new record high; it has risen nearly $50 in the first month of the year. (Golden Ten)

data.title: zCloak AI Launches New Trust Infrastructure for AI Economy
data.description: zCloak AI has officially launched, unveiling a new trust infrastructure tailored for the AI-native economy. According to NS3.AI, the platform utilizes its core ATP protocol to create responsible identity, verifiable claims, privacy-preserving compliance, and immutable reputation tracking on-chain. Furthermore, it facilitates efficient semantic search and AI agent collaboration through an ICP-based data architecture, with the goal of automating AI agent interactions and promoting the adoption of trust.

data.title: World Gold Council: Global gold demand to hit record high in 2025
data.description: The World Gold Council's 2025 Global Gold Demand Trends report shows that global gold demand reached a record high of 5,002 tons in 2025. A record-breaking fourth quarter concluded an extraordinary 2025. Continued geopolitical and economic uncertainty drove a significant surge in gold investment demand, bringing the total demand for the year to $555 billion. Global gold investment demand reached a milestone of 2,175 tons, becoming the main driver of the record-breaking total gold demand in 2025. Globally, investors seeking safe haven and asset diversification flocked to gold ETFs, with a net increase of 801 tons throughout the year. Meanwhile, physical gold investment demand remained strong, with global demand for gold bars and coins reaching 1,374 tons, valued at $154 billion. The Chinese and Indian markets performed exceptionally well, achieving year-on-year growth of 28% and 17% respectively, accounting for more than 50% of the demand in this sector combined. (Jinshi)
